languages.text: {n}Иждриг Батошски надсадно рычит, булькая пробитыми легкими. Старый солдат ловит ваш взгляд и ухмыляется, а затем кивает вам. Последним движением полковник отдает честь и его глаза закрываются навеки.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Батошски
Батошски губернатор и НЕ спасен в бою.

Батошски
Батошски губернатор и НЕ спасен в бою.

languages.text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski lets out a strained growl as blood bubbles in his pierced lungs. The old soldier catches your eye and smirks, then gives you a nod. With one final movement, the colonel salutes, and his eyes close forever.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг Батошски надсадно рычит, булькая пробитыми легкими. Старый солдат ловит ваш взгляд и ухмыляется, а затем кивает вам. Последним движением полковник отдает честь и его глаза закрываются навеки.{/n}

{n}Izdrig Batoshski lets out a strained growl as blood bubbles in his pierced lungs. The old soldier catches your eye and smirks, then gives you a nod. With one final movement, the colonel salutes, and his eyes close forever.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基发出一声勉强的低吼，血泡从他被打穿的肺里翻涌出来。这名老兵捕捉到你的目光，咧嘴一笑，又朝你点了点头。上校拼尽全力敬了最后一礼，接着双眼便永远合上了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski lets out a strained growl as blood bubbles in his pierced lungs. The old soldier catches your eye and smirks, then gives you a nod. With one final movement, the colonel salutes, and his eyes close forever.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基发出一声勉强的低吼，血泡从他被打穿的肺里翻涌出来。这名老兵捕捉到你的目光，咧嘴一笑，又朝你点了点头。上校拼尽全力敬了最后一礼，接着双眼便永远合上了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}İzdrig Batoshski, delinmiş akciğerlerinde kan kabarcıklanırken zoraki bir hırıltı çıkarıyor. İhtiyar asker, gözlerini yakalayıp gülümsüyor ve sonra başıyla onaylıyor. Son bir hareketle selam veriyor, ardından gözleri sonsuza dek kapanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski lets out a strained growl as blood bubbles in his pierced lungs. The old soldier catches your eye and smirks, then gives you a nod. With one final movement, the colonel salutes, and his eyes close forever.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig Batoshski, delinmiş akciğerlerinde kan kabarcıklanırken zoraki bir hırıltı çıkarıyor. İhtiyar asker, gözlerini yakalayıp gülümsüyor ve sonra başıyla onaylıyor. Son bir hareketle selam veriyor, ardından gözleri sonsuza dek kapanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski pousse un grognement de douleur tandis que ses poumons percés s'emplissent de sang. Le vieux soldat croise votre regard et hoche la tête en vous lançant un sourire satisfait, puis il vous salue avant de fermer les yeux pour toujours.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski lets out a strained growl as blood bubbles in his pierced lungs. The old soldier catches your eye and smirks, then gives you a nod. With one final movement, the colonel salutes, and his eyes close forever.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski pousse un grognement de douleur tandis que ses poumons percés s'emplissent de sang. Le vieux soldat croise votre regard et hoche la tête en vous lançant un sourire satisfait, puis il vous salue avant de fermer les yeux pour toujours.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski deja escapar un gruñido forzado mientras la sangre burbujea en sus pulmones perforados. El viejo soldado repara en tu mirada y sonríe, y después asiente. Con un último movimiento, el coronel te dedica un saludo militar y cierra los ojos para siempre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski lets out a strained growl as blood bubbles in his pierced lungs. The old soldier catches your eye and smirks, then gives you a nod. With one final movement, the colonel salutes, and his eyes close forever.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski deja escapar un gruñido forzado mientras la sangre burbujea en sus pulmones perforados. El viejo soldado repara en tu mirada y sonríe, y después asiente. Con un último movimiento, el coronel te dedica un saludo militar y cierra los ojos para siempre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski stößt ein gepresstes Stöhnen aus, als Blut in seine durchbohrte Lunge strömt. Der alte Soldat sucht deinen Blick und nickt dir grinsend zu. Mit einer letzten Anstrengung salutiert der Colonel, ehe er für immer die Augen schließt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski lets out a strained growl as blood bubbles in his pierced lungs. The old soldier catches your eye and smirks, then gives you a nod. With one final movement, the colonel salutes, and his eyes close forever.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski stößt ein gepresstes Stöhnen aus, als Blut in seine durchbohrte Lunge strömt. Der alte Soldat sucht deinen Blick und nickt dir grinsend zu. Mit einer letzten Anstrengung salutiert der Colonel, ehe er für immer die Augen schließt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}イズドリック・バトシュスキーは、肺に貫通した傷から血が泡立つ中、苦しそうに唸り声を上げる。老兵はあなたの目を捉え、嘲笑うように微笑み、そして頷く。最後の動きで、彼は敬礼し、眼は永遠に閉じる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig Batoshski lets out a strained growl as blood bubbles in his pierced lungs. The old soldier catches your eye and smirks, then gives you a nod. With one final movement, the colonel salutes, and his eyes close forever.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}イズドリック・バトシュスキーは、肺に貫通した傷から血が泡立つ中、苦しそうに唸り声を上げる。老兵はあなたの目を捉え、嘲笑うように微笑み、そして頷く。最後の動きで、彼は敬礼し、眼は永遠に閉じる。{/n}
